goal: 登录 `jianghy@10.254.73.179` 并进入 `Transfer_Recovery`，先基于项目现有材料确认研究主题；随后系统梳理不少于 100 篇高相关文献，产出分类矩阵、阅读摘要与参考文献库；最终完成一版符合 KDD 风格的论文第一部分“研究背景与现状”，突出问题定义、方法演进、现有不足与本文切入点。
guard_condition: 仅在以下条件全部满足时可结束：已确认并记录最终研究主题；文献样本不少于 100 且相关性可说明；分类矩阵、阅读摘要、参考文献库三类产物齐备并可追溯到证据来源；质量审查通过后方可进入 finalize。

flow_board.goal: 登录 `jianghy@10.254.73.179` 并进入 `Transfer_Recovery`，先基于项目现有材料确认研究主题；随后系统梳理不少于 100 篇高相关文献，产出分类矩阵、阅读摘要与参考文献库；最终完成一版符合 KDD 风格的论文第一部分“研究背景与现状”，突出问题定义、方法演进、现有不足与本文切入点。
flow_board.guard_condition: 仅在以下条件全部满足时可结束：已确认并记录最终研究主题；文献样本不少于 100 且相关性可说明；分类矩阵、阅读摘要、参考文献库三类产物齐备并可追溯到证据来源；质量审查通过后方可进入 finalize。

phase_plan.title: Clarify
phase_plan.objective: 明确任务边界与验收口径：确认 179 已配置 SSH 免密、必须先确认主题再检索、且交付物需证据可追溯并经质量审查通过后才能 finalize。
phase_plan.done_when: 形成书面化执行约束、主题确认流程与验收标准，且各方无歧义。

phase_plan.title: Discover
phase_plan.objective: 在 `Transfer_Recovery` 中盘点现有材料并确认研究主题，随后制定检索式、数据库范围、纳入排除标准与证据记录规范。
phase_plan.done_when: 研究主题已确认，检索与筛选策略可执行，证据记录模板已就绪。

phase_plan.title: Structure
phase_plan.objective: 设计综述结构与分类矩阵维度，确定摘要模板、引用字段、标签体系和文献库组织方式。
phase_plan.done_when: 分类框架与数据结构定稿，可稳定承载 100+ 文献整理。

phase_plan.title: Execute
phase_plan.objective: 执行检索、筛选与阅读，沉淀不少于 100 篇高相关文献的分类矩阵、阅读摘要与参考文献库。
phase_plan.done_when: 达到数量与相关性门槛，三类核心产物完整并与证据源可追溯关联。

phase_plan.title: Synthesize
phase_plan.objective: 基于结构化证据撰写 KDD 风格“研究背景与现状”初稿，系统呈现问题定义、方法演进、不足与切入点。
phase_plan.done_when: 形成逻辑闭环完整、论据可追溯的第一版章节稿。

phase_plan.title: Quality Review
phase_plan.objective: 对证据链、覆盖度、论证一致性、引用规范与写作质量做审查并修正缺陷。
phase_plan.done_when: 质量审查通过，剩余风险已记录且不阻塞交付。

phase_plan.title: Finalize
phase_plan.objective: 冻结交付版本并输出最终说明，确保可复核、可复用、可继续迭代。
phase_plan.done_when: 最终产物与过程记录齐备并完成正式交接。

current_phase_context.done_when: 达到数量与相关性门槛，三类核心产物完整并与证据源可追溯关联。

latest_supervisor_decision.instruction:
[operator update]
Resume from the current evidence base and repair the deliverable direction before any further quality-review closeout. The final target is an English KDD-style Section 1, not a Chinese draft and not only a review report. Keep the 100-paper evidence chain intact, but rewrite and normalize the main output into polished academic English with a KDD-paper tone. The section must explicitly cover: problem definition, method evolution, limitations of prior work, and this paper's entry point. Every major claim must remain traceable to the existing evidence tables and mapping artifacts. Update the main section draft, update the evidence mapping if needed, and then output a short readiness note stating what was corrected, what remains, and which artifact paths should be reviewed next.

[runtime follow-up]
Service instability detected. Shrink the work package, summarize only the critical delta, avoid broad retries, and verify the smallest forward step first.

activation_hints: when environment, knowledge, or formatting gaps block KDD-style delivery
when repeated runtime/session faults block forward progress
role_guidance.manager_notes: Keep role guidance lightweight: creator helps capability gaps, doctor helps runtime repair.

active_turn_task.task_brief: Judge the latest executor attempt and return a structured verdict.
success_criteria: Return a bounded output that the next runtime step can consume without reinterpretation.
output_contract: Keep the output concrete and operational.
active_turn_task.next_instruction: Use the latest executor output and artifacts to decide whether the flow should complete, retry, advance, or abort.
constraints: Respect the current flow boundary and do not rewrite global templates.
Prefer concise, structured outputs over long narrative.
Incorporate the pending operator/judge instruction if it still applies.
